markdown:
#  Redistribute a Submittal 
##  Background 
Once a submittal has been distributed, you may need to redistribute it again at a later time. For example, you can redistribute a submittal when you need to include a person who was not on the original distribution list, attach a different or new file, or add/delete comments. You can redistribute the submittal as many times as necessary to ensure that everyone has been properly notified and have the most recent information pertaining to the submittal.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permission** :
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Submittals tool.
  * **Prerequisite** :
    * Complete the steps in [Distribute a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/distribute-a-submittal).
  * **Additional Information** :
    * When a submittal is redistributed, it is sent by email to the people designated in the Submittal's tool configuration settings. 


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.
  2. Navigate to the **Items** tab.
  3. Click **View** next to the submittal you want to redistribute. 
#####  Tip
To quickly locate submittals that have been distributed, you can click on the 'Distributed Date' column to sort the Submittal Items list by their distributed date.
![Submittals Sort By Distributed Date](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/00eb0cb6389e0388ff1a1a8ced18e14c/a19fce8705ac0dddf6a65f14f13003ea/submittals-sort-by-distributed-date.png?fm=webp)
  4. To view a summary of the submittal's distribution history, click **Info** on the blue banner at the top of the submittal's page.  
  
![View Submittal Distribution History](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ac3fb7f6d78018c655ba961f49d722e1/8d651ffdd9290fafda237e3a39d9261e/view-submittal-distribution-history.png?fm=webp)  

  5. Click **Redistribute** .  
The remaining steps are identical to those described in [Distribute a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/distribute-a-submittal).  



## See Also
  * [Close a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/close-a-submittal)
  * [Distribute a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/distribute-a-submittal)
  * [Create a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/create-a-submittal)
title: Redistribute a Submittal
description: How to redistribute a submittal that was previously distributed.
